import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails"
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema"
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Delete JSON Web Key Set"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"delete"} path={"/admin/keys/{set}"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Use this endpoint to delete a complete JSON Web Key Set and all the keys in that set.

A JSON Web Key (JWK) is a JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) data structure that represents a cryptographic key. A JWK Set is a
JSON data structure that represents a set of JWKs. A JSON Web Key is identified by its set and key id. ORY Hydra uses this
functionality to store cryptographic keys used for TLS and JSON Web Tokens (such as OpenID Connect ID tokens), and allows storing
user-defined keys as well.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
